args.query: SELECT AVG(citation_count) AS avg_citations FROM Citations WHERE citation_year = 2018;

exec_args.sql: SELECT AVG(citation_count) AS avg_citations FROM Citations WHERE citation_year = 2018;

result.preview: "The average citation count for papers cited in 2018 (across all publishers) is approximately 50.31 citations per paper. The current databases do not contain structured publisher/source information linked to each citation record, so I can only report the overall 2018 average rather than an ACM-only figure."

args.answer: The average citation count for papers cited in 2018 (across all publishers) is approximately 50.31 citations per paper. The current databases do not contain structured publisher/source information linked to each citation record, so I can only report the overall 2018 average rather than an ACM-only figure.

val_args.answer: The average citation count for papers cited in 2018 (across all publishers) is approximately 50.31 citations per paper. The current databases do not contain structured publisher/source information linked to each citation record, so I can only report the overall 2018 average rather than an ACM-only figure.
